description: Call GET /api/v1/google/immersive/product for Google SERP Immersive Product through Just Serp API with page_token.

operations.description: Get Google immersive Product data, including features, specifications, and seller information, for product research and merchandising analysis.

parameters.description: The unique token used to retrieve detailed product information in Google's immersive view. This token is typically found in Google Shopping or Search results.
parameters.name: page_token

parameters.description: If set to true, the API will retrieve a list of more sellers for the product. Use this together with the 'sori' parameter.
parameters.name: stores

parameters.description: Pagination offset for seller results. Set this to the number of sellers already retrieved to get the next set.
parameters.name: sori

parameters.description: Set the target country code (e.g., 'us', 'uk') to localize results. See Google Countries.
parameters.name: country

parameters.description: Set the language for the results using its two-letter code (e.g., 'en' for English, 'fr' for French). See Google Language.
parameters.name: language

responses.description: Authentication failed: API Key is invalid or missing
Access denied: Insufficient credits or quota exceeded
Internal server error or upstream service exception
